de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class SourceData

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SourceData

  • public class SourceData
extends java.lang.Object
    This class keeps track of the next element to match, which is provided by calling method getSource(). The rough idea is to store the parent ast node and the index of the child which has to be matched (for convenience reasons -1 encodes that the parent node itself has to be matched). This kind of wrapping is useful when matching list schemavariables.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SourceData(ProgramElement element, int childPos, Services services)
      creates a new source data object with parent node element whose childPos-th child has to be matched (-1 denotes element itself has to be matched

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getChildPos()
      returns index of the child to be matched
      ProgramElement getElement()
      returns always the parent node
      Services getServices()
      returns the services object
      ProgramElement getSource()
      returns the element to be matched, i.e.
      void next()
      increments the child position by one, this means moving on to the next sibling (or the first child if childPos has been -1 before
      void setChildPos(int childPos)
      sets the index of the child to be matched
      void setElement(ProgramElement element)
      sets the parent node
      java.lang.String toString()
      toString

    • Constructor Detail

      • SourceData

        public SourceData(ProgramElement element,
                  int childPos,
                  Services services)
        creates a new source data object with parent node element whose childPos-th child has to be matched (-1 denotes element itself has to be matched
        Parameters:
        element - the ProgramElement
        childPos - the int giving the index of the child of element to be matched
        services - the Services

    • Method Detail

      • getChildPos

        public int getChildPos()
        returns index of the child to be matched
        Returns:
        an int which is -1 if @link #getElement() has to be matched itself otherwise it refers to the index of the child of element to be matched

      • setChildPos

        public void setChildPos(int childPos)
        sets the index of the child to be matched
        Parameters:
        childPos - the int with the new index

      • getElement

        public ProgramElement getElement()
        returns always the parent node
        Returns:
        the parent node

      • setElement

        public void setElement(ProgramElement element)
        sets the parent node
        Parameters:
        element - the ProgramElement used as new parent node

      • getSource

        public ProgramElement getSource()
        returns the element to be matched, i.e. if @link #getChildPos() is -1 it returns @link #getElement() otherwise it returns the getChildPos()-th child or null if the returned child position is out of bound.
        Returns:
        the ProgramElement to be matched next or null if there is no such element

      • next

        public void next()
        increments the child position by one, this means moving on to the next sibling (or the first child if childPos has been -1 before

      • getServices

        public Services getServices()
        returns the services object
        Returns:
        the services object

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        toString
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
